name: pharos-address-intelligence
description: Read-only address intelligence for Pharos L1 — EOA/contract detection, balances, token holdings, activity, classification, and a 0-100 risk score. Callable as CLI or dependency-free HTTP API.

scripts.package:skill: mkdir -p dist && cd .. && zip -r -FS pharos-address-intelligence/dist/pharos-address-intelligence.zip pharos-address-intelligence/SKILL.md pharos-address-intelligence/scripts pharos-address-intelligence/references pharos-address-intelligence/assets -x 'pharos-address-intelligence/**/.DS_Store' 'pharos-address-intelligence/.DS_Store'
